heroHeadline: Zelenska Facilitates Fourth Ukraine-Russia Child Reunification Exchange
heroSubtitle: Ukraine's First Lady advances humanitarian-diplomatic track on child returns as Kyiv strikes Russian oil refineries and Zelenskyy warns of shrinking Western support
footerNote: Data sourced from UN OHCHR, ISW, CSIS, Ukrainian MoD, US DoD, NATO, IAEA, and major news outlets including Reuters, BBC, AP, Al Jazeera, Bloomberg, and Kyiv Independent. Casualty figures are estimates; Russia has never released official figures.
